description_long: This is a compact, rectangular brick factory building with a flat, dark roof and prominent industrial features. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brick, with visible weathering and rust stains, especially around the metal doors and large ventilation ducts. Two large, cylindrical metal smokestacks with angled bases are attached to the building, showing signs of oxidation and heavy use. The structure includes several metal doors, utility boxes, pipes, and a few small, reinforced industrial windows, but lacks large window expanses. The ground around the building is paved, with some discoloration and grime typical of an urban industrial site. The rooftop is mostly flat and unadorned, except for the bases of the smokestacks and some minor mechanical fixtures.
description: A weathered brick factory building with two large metal smokestacks, industrial doors, and minimal windows, set on a paved surface. The structure features rusted metalwork and visible signs of heavy industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing a main metal door, utility boxes, pipes, and one smokestack base attached to the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by the two large smokestacks and a mostly featureless brick wall with a single round vent.
description_view_2: Side view with a secondary metal door, a small industrial window, and both smokestacks visible at the rear corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large double door, a utility box, and the smokestacks visible in the background.
